facts_kody_pipeline_613240510596.content: When verifying risk gate behavior, the task title/label describes the verification goal, not the implementation task itself — keep scope narrow.

thoughts_srcauth_613241945823.content: This codebase has two auth systems coexisting: legacy session-based auth in src/auth/ and a newer auth system. Any migration must target the legacy system specifically.

conventions_kody_pipeline_613243334103.content: The build stage handles both clarifying questions for the plan AND the implementation. ExitPlanMode is called before proceeding to build.
